steps_completed.description: Create gap analysis and diversity documents

feedback_addressed: #1: POC contradicts hypothesis -> Revised to salience-based hypothesis
#2: Ground truth underspecified -> Counterfactual human judgment + IAA targets
#3: Selection bias -> Explicit scope: silent errors study
#4: One-per-trajectory confound -> Control group + stratified assignment
#7: SWE-bench semantics -> Separate analysis, native perturbations
#8: Statistical power -> Hierarchical analysis, power calculation
#9: Human = ground truth -> CCG measures relative bias
#1: Ground truth weakness -> Added 40-trajectory execution-based validation subset
#2: Statistical power marginal -> Acknowledged, hierarchical analysis mitigates
#3: Control group too small (50) -> Increased to 100 trajectories
#4: SWE-bench hedging -> Made decisive commitment: KEEP, analyze separately
#5: Missing pre-registration -> Added OSF pre-registration plan
#6: Hypothesis unfalsifiable -> Added explicit falsification criteria with thresholds
